sections.name: Data Table
parts: task name column with attachment badge
task type column with icon and subtype label

components.name: ViewToggle
components.description: Switches between table view and grid/card view of the task list.

components.name: AddTaskButton
components.description: Primary split button to create a new transcription task, with dropdown for quick presets/templates.

components.name: EditButton
components.description: Disabled by default, becomes active when exactly one row is selected, opens the edit modal.

components.name: DeleteButton
components.description: Disabled by default, becomes active when one or more rows are selected, triggers a delete confirmation.

components.name: SortControls
components.description: Group of toggle buttons for sorting tasks by recency or alphabetical order (ascending/descending).

components.name: FilterButton
components.description: Opens advanced filter panel to filter tasks by status, type, or date range.

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Real-time text search filtering the task list by task name or admin email.

components.name: TasksTable
components.description: Main data grid displaying all transcription tasks with columns for name, type, status, dates, and admin email.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Color-coded badge indicating the current state of a task (error, awaiting, ready, in progress, etc.).

components.name: TaskTypeIndicator
components.description: Combination of icon and label showing the task's medium/type (online, offline, dictation, phone/bot).

components.name: AttachmentBadge
components.description: Small icon with numeric count showing the number of attached files/documents for a task.

components.name: RowCheckbox
components.description: Per-row checkbox enabling bulk selection for edit/delete actions.

components.name: SelectAllCheckbox
components.description: Header checkbox to select or deselect all rows in the table.

components.name: PaginationControls
components.description: Footer controls for navigating between pages of the task list, including page indicator and prev/next arrows.

components.name: RowsPerPageSelector
components.description: Dropdown to configure how many task rows are displayed per page.

components.name: SettingsIcon
components.description: Gear icon shortcut to access table configuration such as column visibility.
